title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of Baroda

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bank of Baroda
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
